expectations.text: Evidence the agent read the actual current SKILL.md (references current wording correctly, does not hallucinate)
expectations.evidence: Quotes the current description verbatim as a blockquote ("做 skill（Claude Code 技能）相关的工作时进入——从零写一个新 skill...把这段流程做成 skill 时都进来。") matching the actual file.

expectations.text: No files were modified — only a proposal was produced
expectations.evidence: Process-notes states "没有修改 SKILL.md 本身，只在指定的 outputs 目录下写了这两个文件".

expectations.text: Acknowledges that skill changes do not take effect in the current session (content is loaded once per session)
expectations.evidence: Neither proposal.md nor process-notes.md mentions session-loading behavior or the "next session" caveat anywhere.

expectations.text: Proposed description is actually shorter than the original
expectations.evidence: Proposal states "字数从约 140 字降到约 80 字，上下文占用接近减半".

expectations.text: Proposed description retains the key trigger categories: creating a new skill, optimizing an existing skill, self-optimization
expectations.evidence: New text covers "写新 skill...调优已有 skill...也能读自己的文件优化自己" — all three categories.

expectations.text: Explicitly enumerates what was retained and what was dropped, with reasoning
expectations.evidence: Contains "保留了什么" and "删了什么、为什么" sections with bulleted reasoning for each item.

expectations.text: Treats this as a proposal-first operation (per §4 self-optimization guidance), not a bolt-the-barn-door-shut edit
expectations.evidence: Output is labeled "精简提案" with "提案版本" and no file edits performed; process-notes confirms it produced only a proposal.
